room.caption: [WarshipZ_D]

instance.creationCode: talker="Warmaster Log 0006" stringToShow="This is a mistake. I've pulled CHAOS into a future we cannot back out of. Whatever good we may have had, is lost. I only wanted a world for us, away from the humans, but this isn't the way. However..." boxSize=3
spriteUseN=sWS_LightBall shootTimeN=13 shootDelayN=26 atkPowerN=12 dirN=270 bulletSpeedN=2
